name: magnoliaeda
description: Workspace runner for Magnolia EDA client and server

scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run server:dev" "npm run MainSite:start" "npm run EcodevSite:start"
scripts.sync:styles: TARBALL=$(cd shared-site-styles && npm pack --silent) && npm --prefix MainSite install "./shared-site-styles/$TARBALL" && npm --prefix EcodevSite install "./shared-site-styles/$TARBALL"
scripts.build: npm --prefix MainSite run build && npm --prefix EcodevSite run build
